title: Bug in the preparation of the simulation of some stateful cells in some cases

features.name: stateful cell output with slice operations and ternary conditions
features.description: Code should include a stateful cell output signal that is sliced and updated using ternary conditions in sequential logic
features.snippet: reg [1:0] celloutsig; always @(*) celloutsig = clk ? data[97:96] : (data[65:64] ? 2'b10 : 2'b00);
